subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This is Thy ancient servant and long-standing attendant who hath clung to the gate of Thy oneness and stood before Thy threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذا عبدک القدیم و خادمک منذ امد مدید قد لزم باب احدیتک و قام لدی عتبة
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @naming of children; of individuals
